<!-- Source: .nybo/ — run `nybo doctor --fix` to regenerate -->


When saving notes to auto memory, prefer domain-specific observations.
Project conventions are managed in `.nybo/memory/domains/*.md`.
Use the nybo-curate skill to add new conventions to the project memory.

## LLM enrichment routing (ADR-0012)

When the nybo CLI writes a `nybo: <surface> needs LLM reasoning; run /<skill>` stderr hint,
the canonical contract is the persisted pending entry at `.nybo/state/pending-suggestions.jsonl`
(append-only JSONL). Read it any time with `nybo state list-suggestions` and run the suggested
receiver skill directly: `/nybo-brownfield-bootstrap`, `/nybo-suggest-features`,
`/nybo-suggest-entities`, or `/nybo-ai-prefill`. After the skill completes its work, it MUST
clear the matching entry via `nybo state clear-suggestion --skill <name> --cwd <path>`.
The stderr hint is a courtesy fallback — `pending-suggestions.jsonl` is the contract.
